description.ko: 순수한 백색광이 크리스탈 프리즘을 통과하며 굴절되어, 미니멀한 배경 위로 선명한 무지개 빛깔 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 환상적인 물리적 현상을 담아냈습니다.
description.en: A breathtaking display of physics where pure white light bends through a crystal prism, dispersing into a vivid spectrum of colors against a minimalist background.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of a triangular glass prism on a dark surface, a single beam of white light entering and refracting into a vibrant rainbow spectrum, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, caustic reflections, 8k resolution, photorealistic
